name: Arugula, Red Onion and Shaved Parmesan Salad
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
5 cups arugula leaves (trimmed, washed, dried, and chilled)
1 small red onion (peeled, cut into very thin rings, and soaked in ice water for 15 minutes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the lemon juice and mustard. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Drain the red onion and pat dry. Just prior to serving, add the arugula and red onion to the dressing and toss to coat.
3. Taste and adjust seasoning with additional lemon juice, salt, and pepper if necessary.
4. Sprinkle the salad with the shaved Parmesan and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
